eligibility: Minimum CGPA 6.5 or above throughout (No active backlogs)
date_of_joining: 1 st week of January (Internship). Candidates receiving a PPO will be converted to full-time employees from July onwards.

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 6 months Internship : ₹20,000 per month Salary after 6 months Internship : CTC 5 LPA Please find the CTC breakup below : Emolument Head Structure Mode of Claim (Monthly/Annually) Basic Salary 15000 Monthly on salary slip HRA 6000 Monthly on salary slip Special Allowance 10702 Monthly on salary slip Medical Allowance 1250 Monthly on salary slip Conv. Allowance 1600 Monthly on salary slip Sub Total (A) 34552 Provident Fund 1800 Employer monthly contribution @ 12% of basic Sub Total (B) 1800 Gross Salary (A+B) 36352 Fixed Pay 436224 Gross Salary x 12 (C x12) Variable Pay 43622 To be paid Annually- based on individual and company's performance) Fixed Pay + Variable pay 479846 Bonus 11500 As per Payment of Bonus Act, 1965 Annual Gross Salary 491346 Gratuity 8654 As per Gratuity Act, 1972 Total CTC 500000 NOTE: 1. You are entitled to payment of gratuity under Payment of Gratuity Act and Rules. 2. Your share of contribution towards provident fund shall be deducted from your gross salary every month (i.e. equal to employer contribution). 3. You, your spouse & children (up to 2) will be covered under the Group Mediclaim as per Policy 4. In addition to the above you will also have accidental coverage under Group Personal Accident Insurance as per policy. 5. For claiming tax benefit in case of admissible allowances & reimbursements (e.g. LTA, Medical reimbursement, etc.), you will have to submit supporting bills to the Company’s satisfaction along with the reimbursement claim form in the prescribed format & within the timeline stipulated by the Company. 6. Compensation is confidential and not to be disclosed. Compensation discussion or disclosure is taken as a serious offence and may lead to strict action by the management.
